scripts.db:local: wrangler d1 execute reachwright --local --env dev --config worker-api/wrangler.toml --file scripts/adopt-local-migrations.sql && wrangler d1 migrations apply reachwright --local --env dev --config worker-api/wrangler.toml
scripts.db:seed: wrangler d1 execute reachwright --local --env dev --config worker-api/wrangler.toml --file migrations/dev-seed.sql
scripts.api:proof: wrangler dev --config worker-api/wrangler.toml --env dev --local --port 8788 --persist-to .wrangler/proof-five/state-live-five --env-file worker-api/.dev.vars --log-level warn
